Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.ResourceContainer

Packages that use ResourceContainer
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
 

Uses of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol with type parameters of type ResourceContainer
 interface Configuration<R extends ResourceContainer>
          A Configuration designates a particular instance of MediaConfig.
 

Uses of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 interface MediaGroup
          Adapter class which provides the asynchronous access to media containers (files) and signals (DMTF's).
 

Uses of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 interface MediaMixer
          This class is required when the application needs to mix (or add, or sum) multiple media streams into a single one.
 interface MixerAdapter
          A MixerAdapter is the materialization of a "Mixer port".
 

Uses of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Subinterfaces of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 interface NetworkConnection
          A NetworkConnection is a JoinableContainer that drives network media ports.
 

Uses of ResourceContainer in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.resource with type parameters of type ResourceContainer
 interface Resource<T extends ResourceContainer>
          Interface for things common to Resources.
